title: Aureline theme-package manifest record
description: Boundary schema for the theme_package_manifest_record frozen in docs/ux/theme_and_visual_asset_contract.md. Every first-party, extension-contributed, community-supplied, imported-translated, or air-gapped theme package declares its identity, version, supported design-token schema range, density and contrast support, deprecated- and substituted-token visibility, appearance-change posture, signature and mirrorability state, deployment admissibility, fallback/substitution disclosure, and the safety-critical-meaning preservation invariants the package MUST honour. The schema mints no parallel theme_class, accessibility_posture_class, density_class, icon_treatment_class, semantic_status_class, trust_visual_state_class, deployment_profile_id, redaction_class, or version_match_state vocabulary; those values are re-exported by reference from schemas/design/token_export_manifest.schema.json, schemas/docs/citation_anchor.schema.json, artifacts/governance/deployment_profiles.yaml, and schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json. Adding a new theme_package_distribution_class, theme_package_signature_state, theme_token_overlay_state, appearance_change_class, or denial_reason is additive-minor and bumps theme_asset_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row. Raw token tables, raw asset bytes, raw rendered screenshots, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw signing keys, and raw credential material never cross this boundary; this schema carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, small substitution counts, and short privacy-safe labels only.

theme_asset_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the theme-package, icon-slot-map, and motion-preset vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version. The same version integer gates schemas/ux/theme_package_manifest.schema.json, schemas/ux/icon_slot_map.schema.json, and schemas/ux/motion_preset.schema.json so the three schemas evolve lock-step.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / support bundles. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw signing keys, raw asset bytes never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

short_label_text.description: Short privacy-safe label text. MUST NOT embed raw paths, raw URLs, raw secret material, or raw asset bytes.

short_note_text.description: Short privacy-safe note text used for compatibility / migration / substitution disclosure rows.

trust_visual_state_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/design/token_export_manifest.schema.json without modification. A theme package MUST NOT redefine restricted_workspace or policy_locked into a hue-only distinction.

policy_context.description: Policy context this manifest was minted under. Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification.

theme_package_distribution_class.description: Closed theme-package distribution-class vocabulary. See contract §4.

theme_package_signature_state.description: Closed theme-package signature-state vocabulary. See contract §4. signature_failed_blocked packages MUST NOT render.

theme_package_mirrorability_class.description: Closed theme-package mirrorability-class vocabulary. See contract §4.

theme_token_overlay_state.description: Closed token-overlay state vocabulary covering how each token row in this package resolves: native mapping, fallback substitution, deprecated-with-replacement disclosure, unmapped-inert (rendered as inert without redefining meaning), or unsupported-blocked. See contract §5.

appearance_change_class.description: Closed appearance-change posture vocabulary. Theme apply/revert MUST be atomic; half-updated appearance state is forbidden. See contract §6.

denial_reason.description: Closed denial-reason set publishers MUST emit on non-conformance. See contract §10.

compatibility_build_range.description: Inclusive [min, max] build-identity range this theme package revision is compatible with. Outside the range, compatibility_class MUST resolve to incompatible_drift_detected.

min_design_token_schema_version.description: Minimum design_token_schema_version this theme package supports. Re-exported from schemas/design/token_export_manifest.schema.json.

max_design_token_schema_version.description: Maximum design_token_schema_version this theme package supports. Re-exported from schemas/design/token_export_manifest.schema.json.

supported_token_schema_range.description: Closed [min, max] design-token schema version range this theme package supports. A package consumed against a design-token schema outside its declared range MUST resolve as incompatible_drift_detected.

deprecated_token_count.description: Count of tokens this package consumes that are marked deprecated by the design-token vocabulary. The theme/debug surface renders this count so reviewers can inspect deprecation pressure rather than inferring it from visual glitches.

substituted_token_count.description: Count of tokens this package serves through substituted_with_fallback. Surfaces MUST disclose substituted tokens to reviewers; silent substitution is non-conforming.

unmapped_token_count.description: Count of tokens this package leaves unmapped. Unmapped tokens render inert (no value) rather than redefining meaning; the count is part of the package's compatibility surface.

blocked_token_count.description: Count of tokens this package would have substituted but the substitution is unsupported_blocked. A non-zero count means at least one row will deny rather than render.

deprecated_token_summary.description: Aggregate counts of deprecated, substituted, unmapped, and blocked tokens in this package. Theme/debug surfaces project these counts as inspectable rows; surfaces that hide the counts behind 'styled successfully' messaging are non-conforming.

deprecated_token_ref.description: Opaque ref to the deprecated token row in the design-token export. Raw token-table values do not appear here.

replacement_token_ref.description: Opaque ref to the replacement token row when one exists. Null only for unmapped_inert / unsupported_blocked rows where no replacement was promised.

visibility_required.description: Frozen at true: every deprecated, substituted, unmapped, or blocked token MUST be visible in the theme/debug surface. Surfaces that bury substitution behind a generic 'fallback applied' message are non-conforming.

visibility_surface_refs.description: Opaque refs to the surfaces (theme/debug pane, support packet row, design-evidence packet row) where this disclosure remains visible to reviewers.

compatibility_note.description: Optional short note explaining the deprecation, substitution, or unmapped-inert posture. MUST NOT embed raw token bytes or raw screenshots.

deprecated_token_disclosure_record.description: One row per deprecated, substituted, unmapped, or blocked token consumed by this theme package. The set is enumerable so reviewers can inspect substitution rather than visually diff a screenshot.

non_color_cues.description: Required non-color cues this theme package MUST preserve for the safety-critical state. A row that lists no non-color cues is non-conforming.

preserved_in_high_contrast.description: Frozen at true: high-contrast themes MUST preserve the safety-critical state's meaning.

preserved_in_forced_colors.description: Frozen at true: forced-colors / system-high-contrast mode MUST preserve the safety-critical state's meaning.

notes.description: Optional short note explaining how the package preserves the state's non-color cues.

safety_critical_visual_state_record.description: One row per safety-critical trust visual state this theme package MUST preserve. A package that maps restricted_workspace or policy_locked to a hue-only difference is non-conforming.

package_id.description: Opaque, stable theme-package id. Frozen on first publication; rename = breaking.

package_revision_ref.description: Opaque revision id for this manifest emission. Multiple revisions of the same package_id share the package_id but mint distinct revision refs.

supported_theme_classes.description: Theme classes this package supports. A package that claims dark_reference but not light_parity is non-conforming for first-party distributions; extension and community packages MAY narrow to a subset, but each missing theme is a declared coverage gap rather than a silent fallback.

supported_density_classes.description: Density classes this package supports. Density affects spacing-like tokens only; a package that maps density to information architecture or focus visibility is non-conforming.

supported_accessibility_postures.description: Accessibility postures this package was reviewed against. MUST include motion_standard plus at least motion_reduced; first-party packages MUST cover the full set.

deprecated_token_disclosures.description: One row per deprecated, substituted, unmapped, or blocked token. The list MAY be empty when deprecated_token_summary is all zeros; a non-zero summary count without matching disclosures is non-conforming.

safety_critical_visual_state_preservatio.description: One row per safety-critical trust_visual_state this package MUST preserve. MUST include at least restricted_workspace and policy_locked; first-party packages SHOULD cover the full set of trust visual states.

import_mapping_report_ref.description: Opaque ref to the import-mapping report. Required (non-null) for distribution_class = imported_translated; null for built-in / extension / community / air-gapped packages that did not pass through an import.

extension_namespace_refs.description: When distribution_class = extension_contributed, the extension namespaces this package contributes overlay entries for. Required (minItems 1) for extension_contributed; forbidden (maxItems 0) otherwise.

explicit_acceptance_decision_row_ref.description: Opaque pin to the decision row authorising rendering for unsigned_explicit_acceptance packages. Required (non-null) when signature_state = unsigned_explicit_acceptance.

compatibility_notes.description: Optional compatibility notes the package author wants reviewers to read (deprecation pressure, mode coverage gap, density caveat). Notes are short and privacy-safe; they do not embed raw token bytes.

allOf.description: built_in_with_product packages MUST carry signature_state = not_applicable_built_in.
Non-built-in packages MUST NOT carry signature_state = not_applicable_built_in.
extension_contributed packages require at least one extension_namespace_ref; other distributions forbid the field entirely.
imported_translated distribution requires a non-null import_mapping_report_ref.
unsigned_explicit_acceptance packages MUST cite a decision row.
Every accessibility-posture coverage list MUST include motion_standard and motion_reduced at minimum.
Every accessibility-posture coverage list MUST include motion_reduced.
Safety-critical state preservation MUST cover restricted_workspace.
Safety-critical state preservation MUST cover policy_locked.
